title: Incident
description: Represents an incident in Enterprise Manager. Incidents are actionable issues detected by monitoring rules, correlated from one or more events.

targetName.description: Name of the target associated with this incident.

targetType.description: Type of the target associated with this incident.

escalationLevel.description: Current escalation level of the incident.

owner.description: Username of the incident owner or assignee.

acknowledgedBy.description: Username of the person who acknowledged the incident.

ruleSetName.description: Name of the incident rule set that created this incident.

timeRaised.description: Timestamp when the incident was first raised.

timeUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last incident update.

timeResolved.description: Timestamp when the incident was resolved.

eventCount.description: Number of events correlated into this incident.

canonicalLink.description: Canonical URI for this incident resource.
